title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Shreemoyee explains to the family where she was and how Aghornath and Nishi abducted her. To her dismay, none of the family members believe her as all the evidence proves it otherwise. Can Shreemoyee prover her innocence?

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

title: Ponchomi
